exemplar.title: How is current knowledge shaped by its historical development?

detailedExemplarData.title: How is current knowledge shaped by its historical development?

strengths: Clearly identifies three specific objects and situates each in its real-world context
Provides coherent, logically structured explanations consistently linked to the chosen IA prompt
Most points are supported by dates, key figures, experimental references and a comprehensive reference list
Strong justificatory thread showing how each object contributes to the overall TOK exhibition
Innovative inclusion of a personal IB Physics data booklet screenshot grounding the prompt in lived experience
weaknesses: Analysis occasionally slips into pure description rather than deeper TOK reflection
Heavy reliance on Wikipedia and user-generated sources undermines academic rigour
Repetitive phrasing in places reduces clarity and precision
Lacks explicit exploration of underlying knowledge questions or critical evaluation of source reliability
No brief TOK conclusion synthesizing how the three objects collectively illustrate the prompt
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The examinerâs total mark of 8 places this work squarely in the 7â8 band. The student demonstrates clear, relevant links between each object and the selected IA prompt, with well-structured narratives supported by appropriate evidence. The justification for each object is strong, and the reference list is comprehensive. However, the commentary falls short of the sustained depth, critical sophistication and source evaluation required for the top band (9â10). Occasional lapses into description, limited TOK reflection on knowledge questions, reliance on Wikipedia and repetitive phrasing prevent the analysis from achieving the highest level of precision. Assigning 8 marks accurately reflects the submissionâs alignment with the 7â8 band descriptors and the examinerâs objective total.

annotations.comment: The studentâs justification correctly notes causal chains of historical developments, illustrating depth in the chosen IA promptâs exploration.
The student situates the evolution chart within its historical context, clearly linking this artifact to the selected IA prompt about historical shaping of knowledge.
The description of Object 1 remains largely descriptive; the student should deepen the TOK analysis by reflecting on how script reforms illustrate shifts in authority and power.
The reference to Teacherspayteachers is clear, but the student should evaluate the reliability of this user-generated source relative to academic or primary evidence.
The link between Eastern Han calligraphy and modern simplified script is well articulated, demonstrating how successive historical developments build on one another.
In the introductory caption, the student should explicitly state the IA prompt chosen to reinforce the focus of the commentary.
The detailed narrative on Zhong Yaoâs contribution effectively ties both century-old and modern reforms to present knowledge of the character.
The justification of Object 1 reads as pure description; the student should explain why this evolution matters for our understanding of written language as knowledge.
The caption for Object 2 clearly identifies the artefact and its origin, grounding the reader in the real-world context of Betty Friedanâs work.
While the student links The Feminine Mystique to second-wave feminism, they should reflect on the reliability of Wikipedia as a source for this critical context.
The student situates the bookâs release within North American social norms effectively, demonstrating its impact on collective knowledge.
The connection between the book and subsequent second-wave feminism is clear, but the student should deepen analysis by exploring underlying knowledge questions.
The inclusion of a personal IB Physics data booklet screenshot is innovative and grounds the TOK prompt in the studentâs lived experience.
The description of relativistic versus classical formulas is informative, yet slips into repetition. The student should streamline to maintain clarity.
The historical narrative leading to Einsteinâs formula is strong, but the student should connect this to a TOK question about paradigm shifts in science.
The final paragraph justifies the objectâs inclusion well, showing how multiple developments shaped present scientific knowledge.
The student provides a range of sources, but heavy reliance on Wikipedia undermines the exhibitionâs academic rigour.
The studentâs reference list is comprehensive and includes access dates, strengthening credibility of their sources.
The student should adopt a consistent citation style (e.g., MLA or APA) across all entries for greater professionalism.
Consider adding a brief TOK conclusion to synthesize how these three objects collectively illustrate the prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:

three objects, but the
real-world contexts of

stated, or the images

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
